security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first, AI-native PKM for engineers and ML practitioners.
bundle.longDescription: Lattice is a local-first, AI-native personal knowledge manager built for engineers and ML practitioners. Your notes are plain Markdown files on your disk.
